title: Storm Alert! Heavy Rain, Hailstorm Today & Tomorrow: Check Which States Are on IMD's High-Alert List
description: Rajasthan is likely to face the brunt of the storm between 3 PM and 8 PM, while Haryana (4 PM–9 PM), Punjab (5 PM–11 PM), and Delhi (6 PM–10 PM) are expected to witness thunderstorms with lightning and possible hailstorms on April 3 and 4.
